title: Devil Crash

negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to crash, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
